description: Sony IMX296 1.58MP global-shutter, 1-lane MIPI, color BGGR Bayer. Generic camera profile for q6a_camstream (all sensor-specific config lives here; the scripts are camera-agnostic).

color_defaults._comment: Fixed WB fallbacks (a grey-card --calibrate overrides them). 1.60/1.52 under-corrected (residual green, and blue is the more deficient channel); nudged to 1.80/1.95 to neutralise under indoor light. Fixed WB is stable (AWB drifts magenta on non-gray rooms); a small sensor thermal-warmup drift remains.

ae._comment: Sensor auto-exposure: median-metered, exposure-only (fixed VMAX). target = raw high-byte median.

awb._comment: Auto white balance gain clamp (damped gray-world). Green-dominant Bayer -> R/B gains > 1; range covers tungsten..daylight for this sensor.

ccm._comment: Lab-calibrated color-correction matrices from Raspberry Pi's IMX296 libcamera tuning (rpi.ccm, src/ipa/rpi/vc4/data/imx296.json). Interpolated to `ct` at load. Rows sum to ~1 (neutral-preserving).
